name: Bound (formerly Fast Bound) FFL Compliance API
what_it_does: FastBound (Bound) REST API for ATF-compliant Federal Firearms Licensee (FFL) record-keeping software. Enables AI agents to manage firearms acquisition and disposition records (A&D bound book), process ATF Form 4473 (Firearm Transaction Record) digitally, retrieve NICS background check integration status, manage FFL inventory and serialized item tracking, access compliance audit trails, handle multiple FFL license management, and integrate with point-of-sale and inventory systems for licensed firearms dealers.
use_cases: Managing firearms A&D bound book records from FFL compliance agents
Processing and tracking ATF Form 4473 records from background check automation agents
Auditing firearms inventory and serialized item records from compliance reporting agents
Integrating FFL compliance data with dealer POS systems from inventory management agents
not_for: Non-FFL operations without ATF licensing requirements
General inventory management without firearms compliance focus
Consumer firearms tracking without licensed dealer status
best_when: A licensed firearms dealer (FFL), gun store, pawn shop with FFL, or firearms manufacturer using FastBound wants AI agents to automate ATF compliance record-keeping, Form 4473 management, and inventory tracking.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Firearms compliance data is federally regulated. ATF record-keeping errors can result in license revocation and federal prosecution. Only licensed FFLs may use this system. No automation that bypasses required background check procedures.

auth.notes: FastBound uses API key authentication with account-level credentials. Scopes control access to acquisition records, disposition records, 4473 forms, and NICS data. FFL license number required for account setup. Webhooks for real-time transaction notifications.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; paid plans required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-FFL monthly pricing; volume discounts for multi-license holders
pricing.notes: Based in US. Market leader for electronic FFL bound book compliance. Used by thousands of gun dealers, pawn shops, manufacturers, and importers. ATF-approved electronic record keeping. NICS integration for background checks. Well-documented REST API.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: FFL license required; ATF compliance is federally mandated
No public MCP server — REST API with scoped API key
ATF Form 4473 automation must never bypass required background check procedures
NICS background check results are time-sensitive — handle delays and denials correctly
A&D records are permanently retained — deletion is not permitted under ATF regulations
Multi-FFL management — each FFL license has separate record-keeping requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Federal firearms compliance data. ATF 27 CFR, PCI-DSS. Scoped API key. US data residency only. FFL license required. A&D records permanent retention required by law.

security_score_components.security_notes: Federal firearms compliance data. ATF 27 CFR, PCI-DSS. Scoped API key. US data residency. Permanent retention required. FFL license mandatory.
